title: staff — TenancyHook + lifecycle hooks
description: Cross-module hook implementations. Staff does not register a bootstrapper (nothing to hydrate at tenant-boot). Registers four cascade hooks: branch-archive prevention, user-archive prevention, tenant-erasure cascade, and coach-status cascade on staff offboarding.

hooks.name: PreventStaffOrphansOnBranchArchived
hooks.purpose: Refuse the archive when any Staff row referencing the branch still has employment_status IN ('pre_hire', 'active', 'on_leave', 'suspended', 'offboarding'). Distinct from the FK RESTRICT (which only blocks hard-delete) — this blocks the archive transition because staff need a target branch after their manager's branch closes.
hooks.returns: BRANCH_HAS_ACTIVE_STAFF (409) with the staff count in the error payload

hooks.name: PreventUserArchiveWithActiveStaff
hooks.purpose: Refuse the User soft-delete when the User has an active (deleted_at IS NULL) Staff row. The offboard flow must run first — Staff.employment_status → offboarded — which fires StaffOffboarded → UnblockUserArchiveWhenLastStaffOffboarded lifts the block. Enforced BEFORE the RESTRICT FK kicks in (which would surface a less informative error).
hooks.returns: USER_HAS_ACTIVE_STAFF (409) with the staff id + tenant id in the error payload
hooks.note: Priority 40 — runs BEFORE PreventUserArchiveWithActiveTenantMembership (priority 50) so the staff-record message wins when both would fire (a staff always has a user membership).

hooks.name: PurgeStaffDataForErasedTenant
hooks.purpose: Cascade delete via FK; writes compliance audit trail entry + emits count metrics per entity family (staff purged, coaches purged, staff_compensation_history rows purged). Audit rows outlive the source rows per financial retention (compensation history in particular — retained 7 years even after the tenant is erased, per legal requirement).
hooks.compliance: GDPR Art. 17 (right to erasure) + financial-retention exception. Compensation history rows are NOT purged with the tenant — they migrate to a compliance-archive table (retained in encrypted form by ops for the 7-year window, keyed to a tenant-anonymised id).

hooks.name: CascadeCoachStatusOnStaffOffboarding
hooks.purpose: Cascades: when the parent Staff enters leave / suspend / offboarding / offboarded, the linked Coach (if any) transitions along. Leave / suspend → coach.status='paused' (transient — will resume with the staff). Offboarding / offboarded → coach.status='archived' (terminal). Priority 40 so it runs BEFORE notification-tier listeners, giving the notification fan-out the correct coach state.
hooks.note: This is the primary hook that connects the two owned aggregates. Without it, a Staff can offboard while their Coach row stays active — that would leave orphan coach references in future TeamMember rows.

no_bootstrapper.reason: Staff does not need a tenant-boot hydration path — everything is on-demand load from the DB. The BranchManagerResolver + OrgChartResolver bindings cache lazily on first query.
